title: Alaska News Brief February 2023. I’m still shoveling. Let the celebration begin!
summary: Here we are, well into Alaska’s notorious faux spring, where we’re so excited about the returning light that we forget we’ve got another two or three months of deep winter. title: The bad news can be made good and the good news better. Stop Willow and protect the Arctic Refuge.
summary: The ConocoPhillips Willow oil and gas proposal is on the move--and so is the Arctic Refuge Protection Act. Right now, bad news can be made good and the good news better. title: Litigation 101: How did a magistrate imperil already vulnerable polar bears?
